name: Atlas Copco AB
h1: Atlas Copco's GCC footprint in India
lede: Atlas Copco runs six capability centers across four Indian cities. Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Nashik, covering engineering & design, manufacturing and R&D, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atlas Copco office in India. We map six, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atlas Copco AB GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atlas Copco runs 6 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Nashik), covering engineering & design, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Vice President Holding India & Bangladesh - Managing Director
Digital Solutions Head - Compressor Technique Business Area

about.description: Atlas Copco's India footprint covers Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Nashik, spanning engineering & design, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Air and Gas Compressors, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twenty decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atlas Copco operate in India?
faq.a: Atlas Copco operates 6 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atlas Copco have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atlas Copco's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Nashik.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atlas Copco run in India?
faq.a: Atlas Copco runs engineering & design, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atlas Copco's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atlas Copco's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atlas Copco's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 20 leaders at Atlas Copco's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
